text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo hasn't shown up for training. Worried, I
go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...So I decided to tell the reporters this:

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this needs quotes as well."I, King Halo,
the most intelligent and first-rate Umamusume..."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "Shall one day reign from atop the world!"

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You really are the coolest, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! But of course. That's no trouble at all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll even sign ones for your family and friends. I'll
sign every piece of paper you have!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's clear King Halo feels bad for missing practice.
